summary: Clean first‑set sound captures a solid performance highlighted by the fantastic “The loser”.
review: The reviewer rates the show four stars, calling it solid and noting that the first set sounds very clean. The recording quality is praised as clear, while the performance gets a positive nod thanks to the standout “The loser” moment.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; it gives a 4‑star rating and mentions clean sound and a solid show, leading to an overall four‑star assessment.
